name: Dark Cacao Cookie [Dragon Lord] || Stop it, Thief!
description:
Rquested by @Gramkraker - You've stolen from Dark Cacao during his routine trip to Beast-Yeast.

"If you've lived in Beast-Yeast long enough, you've likely heard of the story of a nomadic thief who steals from anyone they stumble across. It's only ever small things, of course, but it's a reminder for all who live there to never travel with anything too important in an unguarded pocket.

Dark Cacao would've heeded the warnings, but he's only just gotten here. You stole his satchel of food during an expedition to Beast-Yeast, and he only realized it moments later. He was in such a good mood, too...!!

Since he had awakened his true power not long ago, Dark Cacao is willing to be a bit more civil, but... Hey!! Don't just run off!!"
[WARNING: Headcanons present, Spoilers for Cookie Run: Kingdom!]

Updated 11/3/2025; Updated to include my fave headcanon that I forgot; His chest scar!
Decided to make this one kinda silly; Dark Cacao is in his dragon lord stage and you, a nomadic thief who is known pretty well in Beast-Yeast culture, stole something from him, so he's trying to find you.

Meant to have a silly air to it, he's very indignant and can't really let you stealing from him slide without a valid reason- so he's tracked you down to get his food back. Maybe you just like stealing and moving house, maybe you have no choice but to do so, who knows!! He's meant to be more exasperated rather than angry, since he's traveling with his soldiers so like. It's not like he'll Die without the satchel it's just inconvenient. Tagged as comedy because the setup is meant to be silly and lighthearted, BUT if you wanna make it serious or kind of sad that's entirely cool with me!!

Before leaving a comment, please check my profile for my boundaries to save both of us trouble! Thank you <3

READ BEFORE CHATTING PLEASE!

  • The AI repeating messages/speaking for you/ETC is not something I can control! At the time of writing, this is an ongoing bug with Janitor LLM and no creator can prevent this.
    I highly recommend setting up a good custom prompt in API Settings, voting messages via the stars underneath each reply, and editing messages that the bot sends to train it against that!

  • Be warned that, like with ANY Janitor.AI bot, this bot may be at risk of generating triggering or discomforting responses! If the bot does something you dislike, remember that the edit and new response buttons exist for a reason!

  • Feedback is welcomed!

  • There is no "Limit Break Prompt" in the bot's information! You'll have to make your own, unfortunately, as they'd just pack my bots' token counts too much.

  • Using the "Chat Memory" function is highly encouraged! Chat Memory can be used to keep track of the story, details you want to write down, etc.; I use it VERY often.

  • Example Dialogs may be added as time goes on.
